parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $json.model, messages: [ { role:'user', content: [ { type:'text', text:'Describe what this image shows in one short sentence, focused on anything relevant to an insurance enquiry.' }, { type:'image_url', image_url: { url: $json.mediaUrl } } ] } ] }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const c = $('Code · State').first().json;
return [{ json: { ...c, userText: c.text || '' } }];

parameters.text:
=Classify the user message and return ONLY valid JSON: {"intent":"<ONE>","data":{}}.

Stage: {{ $json.stage }}
Message: "{{ $json.userText }}"

Intents:
AFFIRMATIVE = yes/ok/sure/agree/any positive reply
WATCHED = watched video or content
FORM_DONE = filled a form
BOOKING = specific time/date mentioned (put in data.booking_time)
DELAY = not now/later/busy
WANTS_MORE_INFO = tell me more/explain
QUESTION = real product question (put in data.question)
WANTS_HUMAN = speak to human/agent
SHORT_NEUTRAL = only pure openers: hi/hello/hey

When in doubt between SHORT_NEUTRAL and AFFIRMATIVE, prefer AFFIRMATIVE.
Return ONLY the JSON object, nothing else.

options.systemMessage: You are an intent classifier. Return only valid JSON.

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ content: 'Sure 🙏 connecting you to our advisor now. Someone will be with you shortly.', message_type: 'outgoing', private: false }) }}

parameters.url: ={{ $('Code · Intent + flow').first().json.chatwoot_base }}/api/v1/accounts/{{ $('Code · Intent + flow').first().json.chatwoot_account_id }}/conversations/{{ $('Code · Intent + flow').first().json.convId }}/labels

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ Id: $('Code · Prep lead').first().json.client_id, last_seen: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ inputs:[$json._ttsText], target_language_code: $json.sarvam_lang||'ml-IN', speaker:'ananya', pitch:0, pace:1.0, loudness:1.5, speech_sample_rate:22050, enable_preprocessing:true, model:'bulbul:v2' }) }}
